title: referrals — PHP attribute contracts
description: Four class-level attributes for listener discovery. `AsReferralProgramListener` subscribes to program lifecycle events; `AsReferralListener` subscribes to referral-instance lifecycle events; `AsReferralRewardListener` subscribes to reward lifecycle events (materialization, payment, clawback); `AsReferralFraudFlagListener` subscribes to fraud events. Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events. No property-level attributes: the five owned rows use ordinary Eloquent + spatie/laravel-data class attributes shipped by foundation.

attributes.name: AsReferralProgramListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to referral-program lifecycle events (ReferralProgramCreated / ReferralProgramActivated / ReferralProgramPaused / ReferralProgramArchived / ReferralProgramBudgetReached / ReferralProgramBudgetSpike).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every ReferralProgram* event.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue.

attributes.name: AsReferralListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to referral-instance lifecycle events (ReferralClicked / ReferralClaimed / ReferralSignedUp / ReferralTriggerReached / ReferralEnteredVesting / ReferralVested / ReferralRewarded / ReferralCancelled / ReferralExpired / ReferralInvitationSent / ReferralInvitationClicked). Also covers ReferralMaxReferralsPerReferrerReached.

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to every Referral* event.

attributes.name: AsReferralRewardListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to reward lifecycle events (ReferralRewardMaterialized / ReferralRewarded / ReferralClawback).

attributes.name: AsReferralFraudFlagListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to fraud events (ReferralFraudDetected / ReferralFraudFlagReviewed / ReferralFraudDismissed). ReferralFraudDetected is P1 CRITICAL for severity IN ('block', 'critical') — consumers of that event MUST alert admin.
